# contentModificationDate

**Type Property**

The item’s modification date.

## Declaration

```swift
static var contentModificationDate: NSFileProviderItemFields { get }
```

## Tracking Usage

- **creationDate**: The item’s creation date.
- **lastUsedDate**: The date the item was last used.

items.description: The date the item was last used.
